product_overview: Bara is a gamified cooking-learning app that teaches recipes, techniques and culinary culture through short, progressive lessons inspired by Duolingo-style mechanics. Users progress via learning paths by country or goal, earning XP, maintaining streaks and managing lives while exploring country hubs and recipe content.
core_goals: Enable new users to complete their first recipe in session one and form a daily cooking habit
Provide short, low-friction gamified lessons with immediate feedback (XP, lives, confetti)
Surface progressive learning paths by country and by goal with visible node-based progression
Support retention via streaks, lives system and clear reward signals while keeping the core experience free

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Allow new users to create an account with name, email and password and enter the onboarding flow.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/register -> Fill in name input field -> Fill in email input field -> Fill in password input field -> Submit registration -> Redirect to /#/onboarding/intro and see onboarding introduction

Navigate to /#/register -> Fill in name input field -> Fill in email input field with existing or invalid email -> Fill in password input field -> Submit registration -> See error message indicating invalid data or existing email

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate existing users with email and password; on success they are taken to the main experience and credentials are stored securely.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Submit login -> Receive authentication token stored securely -> Redirect to /#/main and see main experience
Navigate to /#/login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field with incorrect credentials -> Submit login -> See error message indicating invalid credentials

features.name: Onboarding Flow
features.description: Multi-step onboarding that introduces the product, captures learning mode, goals and initial country to personalize the learning path.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/onboarding/intro -> Read introduction -> Navigate to /#/onboarding/mode -> Select learning mode (explore or challenge) -> Navigate to /#/onboarding/goals -> Select one or more learning goals -> Navigate to /#/onboarding/countries -> Select initial country/cuisine -> Complete onboarding -> Redirect to /#/main

Navigate to /#/onboarding/intro -> Skip required selections or leave mode/goals/country empty -> Attempt to complete onboarding -> See validation error prompting required selections -> Remain in onboarding until selections are valid

features.name: User Profile
features.description: View and update user identity and stats (XP, level, streak, avatar) and sign out.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/profile -> View current XP, level and streak -> Open avatar selection -> Choose avatar -> Edit username -> Save changes -> See updated profile reflecting new username/avatar
Navigate to /#/profile -> Edit username with invalid or empty value -> Attempt to save changes -> See validation error and no changes persisted

features.name: Learning Path Roadmap
features.description: Visual roadmap of the user's current learning path showing connected nodes, progress state and access to lesson details.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/main -> View connected node roadmap for current path -> Select an available node to view its lesson details -> Start lesson -> Complete node -> See node marked completed and next nodes unlocked -> See XP awarded for completion
Navigate to /#/main -> Attempt to access a locked node -> See message indicating node is locked and the unlocking requirement (level or prerequisite node) -> Remain on roadmap

features.name: Interactive Lesson Game
features.description: Gamified lesson experience with multiple-choice / checklist / video cards, immediate feedback, lives, XP rewards and celebration on completion.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/main -> Open a lesson card -> View lesson card content -> Select an answer option -> Receive correct audio and visual feedback -> Progress through all lesson cards -> See XP earned at completion -> See confetti celebration

Navigate to /#/main -> Open a lesson card -> Select an incorrect answer option -> Receive incorrect audio and visual feedback -> Lose a life -> If lives reach zero, see blocking no-lives state preventing lesson start

features.name: Country Selection and Exploration
features.description: Browse world cuisines, open country hubs to see recipes and cultural content, and view progress per country.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/experience/countries -> Browse list of countries/cuisines -> Select a country -> View country hub with recipes and cultural content -> Open recipes list for the country at /#/experience/recipes and view recipe items
Navigate to /#/experience/countries -> Select a country -> API fails to load hub content -> See an error or empty state indicating content couldn't be loaded

features.name: Pantry / Ingredient Inventory
features.description: Manage a personal pantry by viewing, adding and removing ingredients used in lessons and recipes.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/pantry -> View current pantry ingredients -> Add new ingredient -> See the new ingredient appear in the pantry list
Navigate to /#/pantry -> Add new ingredient with missing or invalid information -> See validation or network error and ingredient not added

features.name: Global Leaderboard
features.description: Display top users globally by XP and surface the current user's ranking and basic profile details.
user_flows: Navigate to /#/leaderboard -> View list of top 50 users ranked by XP -> See own position and each user's username, avatar and XP
Navigate to /#/leaderboard -> Leaderboard API request fails -> See error or empty state indicating leaderboard could not be loaded

features.name: Admin Content Management
features.description: Admin-facing dashboard to manage learning content: create, edit and delete nodes, paths and countries (access controlled by admin role).
user_flows: Navigate to /#/admin as an authenticated admin -> View admin dashboard with content statistics -> Create a new learning node -> Edit an existing node -> Delete a node -> See changes reflected in the admin library
Navigate to /#/admin as an unauthenticated user or non-admin -> Attempt to access admin route -> See access denied or be redirected to /#/login

routes.description: App entry point with options to login or register
User login screen with email and password
Main hub with tabbed navigation (roadmap and goals)
Browse and select countries/cuisines to learn
List of recipes for a selected country or path
User profile with XP, level, streak, and avatar

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new account with name, email, and password
user_interactions: See error message on invalid data or existing email
Get redirected to onboarding on success

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials, JWT token stored securely
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials
Get redirected to main experience on success

features.name: Onboarding Flow
features.description: Multi-step onboarding to select learning mode, goals, and initial country
user_interactions: Read intro information and click Next
Select one or more learning goals
Complete onboarding to reach main experience

features.name: User Profile
features.description: View and edit user profile including username, avatar, XP, level, and streak
user_interactions: View current XP, level, and streak
Tap avatar to open avatar selection

features.name: Learning Path Roadmap
features.description: Visual roadmap of learning path with connected nodes showing progress
user_interactions: View connected node roadmap for current path
Tap a node to see lesson details

features.name: Interactive Lesson Game
features.description: Duolingo-style gamified lesson with multiple choice, checkboxes, video cards, lives system, XP rewards, and confetti celebration
user_interactions: View lesson card (multiple choice, checklist, or video)
Receive correct/incorrect audio and visual feedback
Lose a life on wrong answer
Celebrate with confetti on lesson completion

features.name: Country Selection and Exploration
features.description: Browse world cuisines by country, view country hubs with recipes and cultural content
user_interactions: Tap a country to view its hub
See country-specific recipes and cultural content

features.name: Pantry / Ingredient Inventory
features.description: Manage a personal pantry of available ingredients

features.name: Global Leaderboard
features.description: View top ranked users globally by XP
user_interactions: View list of top 50 users ranked by XP
See username, avatar, and XP for each ranked user

features.name: Admin Content Management
features.description: Admin panel to create, edit, and delete learning content
user_interactions: View admin dashboard with content statistics
Create, edit, and delete learning nodes
Create, edit, and delete learning paths

known_limitations.issue: Flutter web uses hash-based routing — all routes must be prefixed with /#/ (e.g. /#/login, /#/main)
known_limitations.impact: Navigation to /login without hash will not work; always use /#/login pattern

known_limitations.issue: No offline caching strategy; all data fetched live from API
No refresh token mechanism; JWT may become stale
known_limitations.impact: Users may get logged out unexpectedly
Hard to maintain and test in isolation

known_limitations.issue: Dual admin interfaces (legacy features/admin/ and modern features/admin_v2/)
